terminology_glossary.Produce wash: A solution or method used to clean fruits and vegetables to remove dirt, bacteria, and pesticide residues.
terminology_glossary.Pesticide residue: Traces of chemicals that remain on food products after they have been applied to crops.
terminology_glossary.Food safety: Practices that prevent foodborne illnesses by handling, preparing, and storing food safely.
